slots.name: heading
slots.copy: Start free, scale as you grow.

slots.name: subheading
slots.copy: Free tools to get going — no credit card required. Add premium editions on any hub as your team grows.

slots.name: meta
slots.copy: No credit card required · Premium editions priced per hub

rationale: Single compact pricing masthead using the hero-pricing-value-forward genre archetype on a stack: the value frame is the display heading, one support line names the qualifier, and a caption meta row states the free-tools/premium-editions nuance before handing off to the tier cards below the fold. It opens on the brand's mandated inverse (deep-teal) surface as the sole accent-carrying bookend — the primary 'Get started free' button is the one accent element, with 'Talk to sales' as the quiet sibling (AS-59). Alignment is intentionally omitted so the brand's standaloneStack header grammar resolves it (fixing the prior missing-counterweight failure); no off-grid device is used since the section is a working masthead, not a statement piece. bandHeight stays compact so real prices are not pushed below the fold.
